notes: v0.16.69 — HAZARD / SLIPSTREAM / STRAFE node-mode mockup lab (9 prototypes). Standalone scene replaces the menu for this preview build so you can browse all 9 layouts. Q / W / E switches category (HAZARD / SLIPSTREAM / STRAFE); 1 / 2 / 3 switches variant. HAZARD: rotating lasers (4 spinning beams, dodge gaps), spike walls (paired walls crash inward with rotating gap), ring collapse (concentric rings contract from edge with one gap each). SLIPSTREAM: tunnel dodge (side-scrolling tunnel, sin-wave walls), ribbon race (3-lane curving ribbon), wormhole (top-down dive into expanding rings). STRAFE: scroll strafe (classic shmup), barrel lanes (3-lane snap), crossfire (anchored centre, enemies from 3 sides). Player ship is auto-piloted with HP bar + hit counter + mechanic description per variant. Pick your favourites per category and I'll port them into the actual Rift node runtime. Windows only.
